title: Presentation Kit Arc
description: Narrative arc mapped to slide beats. Produced by /arc, consumed by /plan-deck and /narrative-auditor.

type.description: Which arc. 'other' requires a custom beats definition.

beats.description: Ordered list of story beats. Every beat must have at least one slide mapped.

id.description: Beat identifier. For SCQA: 'situation', 'complication', 'question', 'answer', 'pillar-1', 'pillar-2', 'pillar-3', 'ask'. For narrative: 'enemy', 'promised-land', 'obstacles', 'magic-gift-N', 'proof', 'ask'. Etc.

slides.description: 1-based slide indexes covering this beat. May overlap with adjacent beats for transition slides.

emphasisCurve.description: Intended emphasis level (0-1) per slide, used to guide transition strength and visual weight. Length = total slides.

constraints.description: Hard constraints enforced by the arc. For 10-20-30: slide count = 10, duration ≤ 20 min, min font size = 30pt. Null for arcs without hard constraints.
